title: Analytics - Events are gathered if user is logged out but opted into data-sharing
scenario: Analytics events continue to be collected after user logs out when Share Data toggle is enabled in App Settings > General > Account
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or profile icon to access Account settings.
4. Go to App Settings > General > Account.
5. Ensure the 'Share Data' toggle is enabled (ON).
6. Log out of the account from the Account screen.
8. Pair or connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager 5200).
9. Trigger a device event, such as adding the device (device_added event with device serial number).
10. Check Firebase Analytics console to verify if the event (e.g., device_added with serial number) was recorded.
expected: After logging out, analytics events should NOT be gathered or sent to Firebase, even if the Share Data toggle is enabled. No device_added or similar events should appear in Firebase.
